meta.title: Krajina — International Store Trenčín

testimonials.label: Happy customers
testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.r1_text: I absolutely love the Asian selection! Kimchi and miso are amazing, just like home.
testimonials.r2_text: Krajina.eu brings Ukraine to my table! Varenyky taste exactly like grandma's.
testimonials.r3_text: Krajina perfectly handles European flavours! Italian cheeses and Spanish olives are a hit.

about.label: About us
about.title: Krajina means land
about.subtitle: we bring you the flavours of the world
about.body: We are a store that wants to bring pleasure and joy in the form of quality food products from around the world. Our selection will satisfy even the most demanding customers.
